content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_explorer

SELECT v.vin, v.modelYear, v.make, v.model
    , classification
    , vr.filepath(1) AS year, vr.filepath(2) AS month
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'cafv_eligibility.json',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
    FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
    ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0b'
) 
WITH (
    jsonDoc NVARCHAR(MAX)
) AS cafv_elegibility
CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(jsonDoc)
WITH(
    cafvEligibility_id SMALLINT '$.cafvEligibility',   
    classification VARCHAR(100) 
)
INNER JOIN
OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'bronze/vehicle.csv', 
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data',
        FORMAT = 'CSV', 
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0', 
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
        ) WITH (
            vehicleId           INT,
            vin                 VARCHAR(10),
            modelYear           SMALLINT,
            make                VARCHAR(25), 
            model               VARCHAR(25),
            electricRange       SMALLINT,
            baseMSRP           INT,
            vehicheTypeId       SMALLINT,
            cafvEligibilityId   SMALLINT,
            vehicleLocation     VARCHAR(30)
            )
        AS v
INNER JOIN
OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_parquet/year=*/month=*/*.parquet',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) WITH (
    vehicleId           INT,
    registrationDate    DATETIME2(7)
) 
AS vr
ON (v.vehicleId = vr.vehicleId)
ON (v.cafvEligibilityId = cafvEligibility_id)
WHERE vr.filepath(1) = '2024' AND
vr.filepath(2) IN ('06','07','08', '09')
